commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region $REGION | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin ${ACCOUNT}.dkr.ecr.${REGION}.amazonaws.com

curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin)['paths']; print('has_advisor', '/advisor-handoff-drafts' in p); print('has_explain', '/review-cases/{case_id}/explanation' in p); print('n_paths', len(p))"
